title: tephrosia coccinea
intro: Tephrosia coccinea, also known as the Scarlet Milkpea or Red Milkpea, is a perennial legume native to tropical Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which have been used to treat various ailments. The health benefits of Tephrosia coccinea include reducing fever, alleviating rheumatism, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis, as well as its potential in lowering blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction by boiling its roots and leaves in water or as a powder for topical application in herbal remedies.
